<?php namespace Illuminate\View; class ViewName { /** * Normalize the given view name. * * @param string $name * @return string */ public static function normalize($name) { $delimiter = ViewFinderInterface::HINT_PATH_DELIMITER; if (! str_contains($name, $delimiter)) { return str_replace('/', '.', $name); } [$namespace, $name] = explode($delimiter, $name); return $namespace.$delimiter.str_replace('/', '.', $name); } }
